def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Array(Int64)
  n = nums.len
  
  # Initialize suffix count arrays of size n + 1. 
  # Indices 0 to n-1 hold suffix counts starting at that index. Index n holds zero counts.
  c_odd = Array(Int64.new(n + 1)).fill(0)
  c_even = Array(Int64.new(n + 1)).fill(0)

  # 1. Precalculate suffix counts (O(N))
  # Iterate backwards from n-1 down to 0
  for i in (n - 1).downto(0)
    # Inherit counts from i + 1
    c_odd[i] = c_odd[i + 1]
    c_even[i] = c_even[i + 1]

    # Check parity of nums[i].
    if nums[i] % 2 != 0 # Odd
      c_odd[i] += 1
    else # Even
      c_even[i] += 1
    end
  end

  # 2. Calculate the score for each element (O(N))
  answer = Array(Int64.new(n))

  for i in 0...n
    # We need counts for j > i, which is the suffix starting at i + 1.
    
    if nums[i] % 2 != 0 # nums[i] is Odd. Score is count of Even numbers to the right.
      answer[i] = c_even[i + 1]
    else # nums[i] is Even. Score is count of Odd numbers to the right.
      answer[i] = c_odd[i + 1]
    end
  end

  return answer
end
